social.giftRegistryDesc: Set up your personal gift registry for weddings, housewarmings, and milestone celebrations.
social.referralRewardsDesc: Share 3BOXES with friends and earn luxury credits. Both of you get rewards on their first purchase.

curate.subtitle: Every piece is handpicked by our expert curators. Explore collections that reflect the finest in luxury, taste, and craftsmanship.
curate.jewelryDesc: A curated selection of fine jewelry that transcends trends — from classic diamond studs to artisanal gold pieces.
curate.watchesDesc: From Swiss movements to smart luxury — timepieces that make a statement on every wrist.
curate.fragrancesDesc: Discover niche perfumeries and luxury houses. Each fragrance tells a story of craftsmanship and allure.
curate.coutureDesc: The latest in designer fashion — sarees, lehengas, and contemporary wear handpicked from top ateliers.
curate.homeDesc: Elevate your living space with premium decor, artisanal candles, and handcrafted accessories.
curate.giftEditDesc: Our signature collection of the most giftable luxury items — approved by our style experts for every occasion.
curate.description: Handpicked luxury collections curated by our expert panel, featuring the finest products from top brands.
curate.timelessJewelryDesc: A curated selection of fine jewelry that transcends trends — from classic diamond studs to artisanal gold pieces.
curate.modernWatchesDesc: From Swiss movements to smart luxury — timepieces that make a statement on every wrist.
curate.artisanFragrancesDesc: Discover niche perfumeries and luxury houses. Each fragrance tells a story of craftsmanship and allure.
curate.coutureEditDesc: The latest in designer fashion — sarees, lehengas, and contemporary wear handpicked from top ateliers.
curate.luxuryHomeDesc: Elevate your living space with premium decor, artisanal candles, and handcrafted accessories.

giftBuilder.title: Gift Builder
giftBuilder.subtitle: Build the perfect gift in 6 steps

howItWorksSteps.2: Select who the gift is for

stepInfo.occasion: Select the occasion for your gift. This helps us understand the context and recommend appropriate gifts.
stepInfo.recipient: Choose who will receive this gift. Different recipients may prefer different types of gifts.
stepInfo.relationship: Your relationship with the recipient helps us personalize the gift suggestions.
stepInfo.budget: Set your budget range so we can show you gifts within your price range.
stepInfo.products: Browse and select one or more gifts. Click on a product to add it to your gift box. Click again to remove it.
stepInfo.review: Review your selections below. You can add items to your cart individually or all at once.
